summary: Verified Dashboard auto-refresh fix for 418, LLC. All 4 checks pass: (1) initial tiles show 1,871 / 1,871 / 198 for pro@axiom.ai viewing 418, LLC; (2) visibilitychange event triggers immediate refetch of /ai/activity + /dashboard/metrics + /reports/income-statement (all 3 fired within 6ms); (3) window focus event also triggers immediate refetch; (4) after PATCH /transactions/{id} needs_review=false, waiting 33s auto-poll updates Needs review tile 198 -> 197 with no navigation; (5) after unmount+remount, only 1 ai/activity call fires in 35s -> no stacked intervals.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx L40-68: useEffect properly guards with `cancelled` flag against stale state, sets 30s interval, and cleanly removes visibilitychange + focus listeners on unmount. Verified no stacked pollers on remount.
onFocus handler correctly gates on document.visibilityState === 'visible' so it doesn't double-fire when the tab is background.
Consider extracting the fetch trio into a custom hook (e.g. useDashboardData) if the same 3-endpoint refresh pattern gets reused elsewhere. Not blocking.
seed_data_creation: None. Flipped one txn (id 35406a57-d8b7-4be2-b53f-cc8904d01988) needs_review false during test, then restored to true.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pro user lands on /pro/clients — to switch context to 418, LLC use [data-testid=company-switcher] top bar dropdown then get_by_text('418, LLC', exact=True). JWT token key in localStorage is 'axiom_token'. GET /api/companies/{cid}/transactions returns {transactions, pagination}. The Dashboard fix is verified working: 30s setInterval + visibilitychange + window focus listeners all refetch, and cleanup properly clears all three on unmount.
rca of the issue: Dashboard previously fetched only when currentId changed, so if the user was viewing during initial ~100-txn Plaid sync, the tiles stuck at 101 until manual refresh. Fix at Dashboard.jsx L40-68 adds 30s setInterval + visibilitychange + focus listeners with proper cleanup. Verified end-to-end with pro@axiom.ai on 418, LLC (1,871 real txns).
